column1: # VicPol CAD Lineup Generator — Station Data
# Fill in one row per station. Lines starting with # are ignored.
# The header row must stay exactly as written.
#   name           Station display name. Do not include "Police Station".
#   region         Single region key letter — must match one of:
#   region_label   Full region name shown in the tool (e.g. "Eastern").
#   division       Division name shown in the dropdown.
#                  Stations with the same division value are grouped together.
#                  Use the format "Division Name (DivCode)" e.g. "Goulburn Valley (ED3)"
#   div_code       Short division reference code (e.g. ED3
#                  Used for internal reference only — not shown in the tool.
#   psa            Code of the Police Service Area station covering this station.
#                  Leave blank if unknown or not applicable.
#   hwp            Code of the Highway Patrol unit that services this station.
#                  Leave blank if unknown or not applicable.
#   ciu            Code of the Crime Investigation Unit that services this station.
#                  Leave blank if unknown or not applicable.
#   classification Station type. Must be exactly one of:
#                                   Ongoing patrol coverage but no continuous on-site staffing
#                                   Key regional hub supporting surrounding towns and rural communities
#                                   Coverage via mobile patrols and nearby hub station support

column2: one vehicle (station car or divisional van only)

column1: #   • Leave a field blank rather than writing N/A or — (just keep the comma).
#   • classification controls how many units the tool generates by default.
#   • Stations appear in the dropdown in the order they appear in this file.
